title: The Royal Palace Calls
description: On pages 14–17, this part follows Chopper, Camie, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #1, Nami, Narrator, Sanji. The core story beat is the royal palace calls.
scene: The scene centers on the royal palace calls, with Chopper, Camie, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #1, Nami, Narrator, Sanji driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Get Sanji-Chin up here!! We'll go to the town!!!

dialogue.speaker: Camie
dialogue.text: CAMIE!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: There are plenty of humans at the port!!! Now hurry!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hold it right there!!! The ryuguu gondola belongs to the -

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'm very sorry!! I promise I'll return it as soon as Sanji-Chin is safe!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All right!! We're all on board, Caimie - Get Moving!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please help us, ryluguu-chin!! Take us to the town!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: ...I'm so sorry... if I had the right blood type myself, I'd donate it in a heartbeat, but...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's nothing for you to apologise about!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's this idiot's fault in the first place for having such a perverted mind!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Take a look - even now he's got a stupid grin on his face!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Sanjiii!! That's enough already!! Don't think about anything!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't have a second to lose!!! This is a matter of life and death!!!

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: Still, first there was that discrimination against you guys back on Sabaody two years ago, and now this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Looks like this problem runs deep...!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: To think that a little pervy nosebleed could turn into such a huge problem.....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And I'm still a little worried about what'll happen once we reach the town...! Will we be able to find a donor at such short notice...?

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: There haven't been any humans arriving on the island in the past month or so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys were the first to arrive in quite a while...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes, it is a real tourist spot...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: I really don't know the reason why... there are rumours all throughout the island lately...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Rumours of somebody stopping anyone from arriving... of some kind of shadowy force behind all of this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, I don't know what to say...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHY WERE YOU ALL HIDING THESE PIRATES FROM US...?!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: We're very sorry, Prince Fukaboshi...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But since they were Caimie's friends...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And they didn't seem like bad people...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We just couldn't bear to see them captured as illegal immigrants...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Do you think Sanji- chan will be all right...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AKKAMAMBO! Akamanbo!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...you seem to have leaped to the wrong conclusion. That crew are famous pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: There was no need for them to undergo any inspections upon entering the island... we know enough of their nature already.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It was with regard to a different matter that we sought them-mi-fasoooo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...oh... we had no idea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: and it would appear I have missed my oppor- tuning...

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: To deliver jinbe's message

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Pengain

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shachi

summary: The Royal Palace Calls. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
